'''tharuju''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:featherbells|featherbells]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-r-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:featherbells|featherbells]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| tharuju
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thærijith|thærijith]] || [[word:thærijij|thærijij]] || [[word:thærijish|thærijish]] || [[word:thæriji|thæriji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tharurujuth|tharurujuth]] || [[word:tharurujuj|tharurujuj]] || [[word:tharurujush|tharurujush]] || [[word:tharuruju|tharuruju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharujuth|tharujuth]] || [[word:tharujuj|tharujuj]] || [[word:tharujush|tharujush]] || [[word:tharuju|tharuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharufjuth|tharufjuth]] || [[word:tharufjuj|tharufjuj]] || [[word:tharufjush|tharufjush]] || [[word:tharufjuf|tharufjuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tharujuthu|tharujuthu]] || [[word:tharujuju|tharujuju]] || [[word:tharujushu|tharujushu]] || [[word:tharujuku|tharujuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tharujuth|tharujuth]] || [[word:tharujuj|tharujuj]] || [[word:tharujush|tharujush]] || [[word:tharuju|tharuju]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tharujuthul|tharujuthul]] || [[word:tharujujul|tharujujul]] || [[word:tharujushul|tharujushul]] || [[word:tharujukul|tharujukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tharujuthuthu|tharujuthuthu]] || [[word:tharujujuju|tharujujuju]] || [[word:tharujushushu|tharujushushu]] || [[word:tharujuku|tharujuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tharujuthun|tharujuthun]] || [[word:tharujujun|tharujujun]] || [[word:tharujushun|tharujushun]] || [[word:tharujukun|tharujukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tharujuthuoro|tharujuthuoro]] || [[word:tharujujuoro|tharujujuoro]] || [[word:tharujushuoro|tharujushuoro]] || [[word:tharujukuoro|tharujukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
